biological_replicate: we generated mpp9 knockout mice using the CRISPR/Cas9 approaches.
experimental_design: Together, these results suggest that MPP9 functions as a negative regulator of cilia formation both in cell lines able to form cilia and the mouse kidney.
factor_value: MPP9 is recruited by Kinesin Family Member 24 (KIF24) to the distal end of mother centriole.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
